title: Stationary Happy Ghast
description: Prevents your happy ghast from flying away from you!
body:
This datapack will allow you to switch between stationary mode or wandering mode (vanilla behavior). When you use the stationary mode, your happy ghast will stay in place and will not fly away after you dismount.

To switch between modes, run the command ``/trigger ghastflymode`` near your happy ghast.
